Boba Paper Straws, 7.75 Inch/197mm Long, 0.5 Inch/12mm Wide. Super Long and Wide Paper Straws, Perfect for Smoothies Jumbo Bubble Boba Tea and Milkshakes. Paper Straws Drinking Not Plastic, They Are Good for Sensitive Teeth.

Disposable Bubble Tea Straws Large in Bulk for Tumblers, Mason Jars, Yeti, Venti, Mugs. Disposable Straws for Tapioca Pearls, Fruit Juice, Boba Tea, Jumbo Tea, Homemade Bubble Tea, Milkshake, Smoothies, Milk Tea, Cola, Cocktail, Hot drinks, Soft Drinks and So On.

Disposable Drinking Straws for Wedding, Birthday, Christmas, Halloween, Showers, Bridal Shower, Housewarming, Engagement, Graduation, Bachelorettes, Cake pops, Decorations and Parties, Holiday Celebrations, Arts and Crafts, Kitchen, Dining, Cooking, BBQ, Barbecue, Picnic, Hiking, Outing.

description: Product Description Thicken upgraded paper straws Made by 4 layers paper. Super thick, hard and sturdy. They can last a long time in your drink. Super wide: 0.5inch / 12mm diameter Disposable paper boba straw, suitable for boba, milk tea, jumbo, bubble tea, tapioca pearls, milkshake, smoothies, thick shakes, fruit granules, taro ball, coconut, beans, slushies, fronzen drinks. Colorful Colorful strips disposable paper boba straws. Made by food-grade kraft paper, BPA free. Say goodbye to plastic.
